title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils For Cough
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils contains thymol and carvacrol, two potent compounds that help relieve coughs. Thymol has antimicrobial properties, which help combat the underlying infections that cause coughs. Carvacrol has anti-inflammatory properties, reducing swelling in the throat and making it easier to breathe. Thymol and carvacrol also have expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to cough up. By targeting the root causes of cou...
